.exit
await registry.updateApprovedHash(1, "0x2aca9283823e1457288731d08d002896d6276d4f7c468da129c352d63cf1fb91")
const registry = await ethers.getContractAt("PipelineRegistry", "0x0F2605F7C8059CD120a6598a701DB84115d01321")
.exit
await registry.updateApprovedHash(1, "0x2aca9283823e1457288731d08d002896d6276d4f7c468da129c352d63cf1fb91")
const registry = await ethers.getContractAt("PipelineRegistry", "0x2aca9283823e1457288731d08d002896d6276d4f7c468da129c352d63cf1fb91")

.exit
